mapper.select: SELECT H.REF_NO AS WORKORDNO, ISNULL(H.REMARK, '') AS WORKLOTNO, W.PROCESSCD AS PROCESSCD, S.PARTNO AS MAT_PARTNO, G.PARTNM AS MAT_PARTNM, H.LOTNO AS MAT_LOTNO, ABS(H.QTY) AS INPUT_QTY, G.UNIT AS UNIT FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK_HISTORY H LEFT JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE S ON H.LOTNO = S.LOTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON S.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_PROD_WORKORDER W ON H.REF_NO = W.WORKORDNO WHERE H.REF_NO = #{WORKORDNO} AND (H.STOCKCHANGEGUBUN = '투입' OR H.STOCKCHANGEGUBUN = 'USE' OR H.QTY < 0) ORDER BY H.CHANGEDAY DESC, H.STOCKHISTORYNO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_STOCK_HISTORY ( LOTNO, LOCATIONCODE, STOCKHISTORYNO, QTY, STOCKCHANGEGUBUN, CHANGEDAY, REMARK, REF_NO, REGUSERID, REGDTM ) VALUES ( #{MAT_LOTNO}, #{LOCATIONCODE}, #{STOCKHISTORYNO}, #{INPUT_QTY} * -1, '투입', CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23), #{REMARK}, #{WORKORDNO}, 1, GETDATE() )
